mapper.select: SELECT * FROM CARDS WHERE card_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND visible_yn = 'Y' AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY view_count DESC FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY

SELECT c.* FROM CARDS c INNER JOIN CARD_BENEFITS cb ON c.card_id = cb.card_id WHERE c.card_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND c.visible_yn = 'Y' AND c.deleted_yn = 'N' AND cb.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY cb.discount_rate DESC NULLS LAST, cb.cashback_rate DESC NULLS LAST FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT card_id FROM CARDS WHERE card_code = #{cardCode} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
INSERT INTO CARDS ( card_code, card_type, card_name, company_name, brand_name, annual_fee_domestic, annual_fee_overseas, previous_month_spend, minimum_age, maximum_age, target_user, summary_description, searchable_yn, visible_yn, approval_required_yn, card_status, publish_start_at, publish_end_at, application_count, view_count, created_by, created_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{cardCode}, #{cardType}, #{cardName}, #{companyName}, #{brandName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{annualFeeDomestic}, #{annualFeeOverseas, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{previousMonthSpend, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{minimumAge, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{maximumAge, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{targetUser, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{summaryDescription, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y', 'Y', 'Y', 'DRAFT', #{publishStartAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{publishEndAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, 0, 0, #{createdBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSTIMESTAMP, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE CARDS SET card_status = #{cardStatus}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
UPDATE CARDS SET card_status = 'PUBLISHED', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
